title: RegionFly
description: Allows players to fly in a certain WorldGuard region. Just like DonutSMP!
body:
# 🪽 RegionFly

RegionFly is a lightweight Paper/Spigot plugin that allows players to fly only inside specific WorldGuard regions, as long as they have the correct permission.

Perfect for hubs, spawn areas, shops, or VIP zones where controlled flight is needed without giving global /fly.

# ✨ Features

🗺️ Flight restricted to WorldGuard regions

🔐 Permission-based access

⚡ Automatically enables flight when entering a region

⛔ Automatically disables flight when leaving a region

🧠 Simple, efficient, and performance-friendly

🧩 Works seamlessly with WorldGuard

# 🔑 Permissions

**regionfly.fly**

Allows the player to fly inside configured WorldGuard regions

# 🛠️ Requirements

Paper / Spigot

WorldGuard

WorldEdit

# 📌 Use Cases

Spawn or hub flight

VIP-only areas

Shops or showcase regions

Safe-zone movement

# 🚀 How It Works

Define a region using WorldGuard

Give players the regionfly.fly permission

When a player enters the region, flight is enabled

When they leave, flight is automatically disabled

No commands, no toggles — it just works.
